# Development lineage — B5-BEYOND-LAYER-BOUND

**Claim**: Pattern-generic Gershgorin reduction of the beyond-layer bound  
**Current tier**: T5 (ACTIVE)  
**Notes**: 72 files / 39 note-lineages  ·  **Sub-proofs**: DR-2 (10), H-LAYER-AUX (9), SC-SCOPE (10), STEP-5B (9), T5-DOSSIER (1)  ·  **Runs**: 26  ·  generated by `build_lineage.py` v1.0.0

> GENERATED FILE — do not hand-edit. Edit `claims/B5-BEYOND-LAYER-BOUND/lineage-narrative.md` (curated arc) and regenerate.

## Development arc (curated)

The B5 development arc closed gate STEP-5B — the admissible-class
exhaustiveness step that gates any whole-Reading-H T6 discussion — over a
single intensive period (2026-06-05/06), passing through five structural
theorems, three registered negative results, eight verify-loop self-catches,
and fourteen operator review verdicts. The arc is the reference example of
the repository's verification-first method: every promotion was earned against
an adversarial review, and the machine self-tests caught author errors before
registration on eight occasions.

**The problem.** STEP-5B requires a class-wide bound: for EVERY admissible
condensate pattern (not merely the five enumerated readings), the beyond-layer
off-diagonal Bloch correction must not overcome the layer margins of
Proposition A. The naive obstacle is an infinite competitor space.

**Phase 1 — reduction (v1.0–v1.6).** The pattern-generic Gershgorin reduction
turned the operator-norm question into checkable inequalities, then a derived
closed region `n ≤ n_max(I)`. Matching lemmas (exact ℓ¹ identity, ℓ² mass),
the sphere additive-energy split (Lemma E, `ν*`), and the exact ring-family
closed form `c_ring(n)=14−18/n` progressively shrank the residual. Two
verify-loop catches landed here: the ℓ¹ constant (catch #1) and the `c=0`
diagonal contamination (catch #2). G2 vertex bookkeeping was closed at
second-cumulant level (Lemmas H/I/J), and the row/collar-ladder route was
honestly REFUTED with its provable constant (catch #4/#5) rather than forced.

**Phase 2 — the structural key (v1.7–v1.8).** The P²-representation theorem
[R-001] collapsed the whole Gershgorin apparatus: the off-diagonal transfer
operator is `W = λ′(P²−2I·Id)` with `P` self-adjoint, so `D+W = D₀+λ′P² ≥ D₀
> 0` unconditionally and the spectrum has an n-free, pattern-free floor. In
position space `P` is multiplication by the condensate profile, which also
DISCHARGED the Nambu/anomalous-block objection (real scalar order parameter).
Parseval then identified the residual exactly: the remaining gap is the
discrete sphere L⁴-extension problem (Stein–Tomas exponent q=4 at d=3). The
universal single-circle theorem [R-002] (K=14 sharp, any amplitudes) removed
all single-circle patterns.

**Phase 3 — the additive-energy program (v1.9–v2.0).** The antipodal-carrier
partition [R-003] and the `ν*=μ_C` identity [R-004] recast the residual as a
carrier-richness bound; the coaxial class was closed and the naive
multi-circle hypothesis H-GEN(2) honestly FALSIFIED (catch #6). The rectangle
reformulation + triple-count gave an unconditional `R=O(n^{5/2})` bound,
upgrading the closed region three orders of magnitude. The operator supplied
the theorem-grade prefactor `c_R=4√14`; the stereographic incidence route
[R-006] was proposed at exponent 28/13, REJECTED by the operator (catch #7,
arithmetic slip), and repaired to 20/9 (provisional).

**Phase 4 — the admissibility route to closure (AddB–AddE).** Rather than
chase the open circle-incidence conjecture, the closure went through physics:
the H-KBAL amplitude-dyadic lift [R-008] removed the balance hypothesis; the
coherence-resolution admissibility cutoff [R-009] derived `n_adm` from the
dressed propagator; and the coherence indistinguishability lemma [R-005]
proved sub-resolution restructuring is energy-faithful (margins ×898/×139/×33),
upgrading H-ADM-COH from proposal to a derived quotient statement. The
cross-reading lemma (catch #8) and the analytic cross-recombination pin
(curvature/co-circularity) plus endpoint hardening completed the chain.

**Closure.** Operator verdict #14 flipped the gate to CLOSED-CONDITIONAL on
the H-ADM-COH amended class (margins ×59.4/×2.6 floors); B5 was promoted to
T5-CANDIDATE. The unrestricted class remains open via the DR-2 route
(research-grade, adjacent to the open circle-incidence conjecture).

**Honest residual.** A later triage of the autonomous T6-mainline session
found that the near-gap small-amplitude endpoint protection is ×2, not the
×100 a draft had claimed — so any further T6 promotion that depends on it is
blocked pending a sharper near-gap kernel. The CLOSED-CONDITIONAL status of
STEP-5B itself is unaffected (it rests on the floor + admissibility chain, not
on the near-gap figure).

B5 was subsequently ASSIGNED T4 -> T5 PINNED-CLOSURE (scope CLOSED@H-ADM-COH-AMENDED-CLASS, second-cumulant order; operator-authorized 2026-06-06). The tier is the honest middle: above T4 because the STEP-5B gate is closed (verdict #14) on theorem-grade pillars (P^2-floor, c_R=4√14, single-circle K=14, carrier partition), and below T6 because the assembled chain still contains strong-evidence-grade lemmas (the indistinguishability and cross-reading lemmas), the endpoint margin is thin (×2.6), and the scope is second-cumulant with the third-cumulant endpoint marginal. The unrestricted-class result remains the DR-2 route (research-grade); the all-orders lift is the open SC-SCOPE target. A five-objection self-adversarial review (the binding gate, since the operator had not externally reviewed) upheld no blocker.

An operator adversarial review (2026-06-06; reviews/2026-06-06-b5-adversarial-review.md) then froze the tiers and reinforced the scope: B5 stays T5 PINNED-CLOSURE only under CLOSED@H-ADM-COH-AMENDED-CLASS + second-cumulant scope (T6 forbidden; the 192/192 is an executed package within the pinned scope, not a physical unconditional proof). The SC-SCOPE all-orders lift was confirmed OPEN pending four named inputs (M-ENDPOINT, GHAT3-Q0, GHAT4-PERTRANSFER, R-U6-1), now registered as gates; DR-2 stays an off-critical research branch with DR2-SHARE the formal obstruction. The tier ladder is unchanged; the review hardened the honest-scope fences.
